description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The structure is composed of two main volumes connected by a narrow enclosed walkway, with the larger volume serving as the primary living space and the smaller as an auxiliary unit. The exterior is predominantly white with sections of natural wood paneling, especially around the deck and porch areas. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the walls, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front features a wooden deck with railings, while the rear and sides are more minimalistic. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with an urban environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white walls, wood accents, and large asymmetrical windows, featuring a main living area and a connected auxiliary unit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the connection between the main and auxiliary units, with visible wood paneling and large windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden deck, porch area, and main entrance, with prominent window placements.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the minimalistic back facade, auxiliary unit, and some wood accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the auxiliary unit and the connecting walkway, with fewer visible windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
